description: Elevate your job search with a professional and simple resume that showcases your career achievements and skills. Ideal for business services and self-promotion, this template offers a streamlined approach to presenting your qualifications. Designed with clarity and precision, it highlights your professional journey in a clean and organized manner, ensuring your CV stands out in the competitive job market. This template is not just a resume, it's a powerful tool for your job search, helping you to promote your services effectively. Additionally, this template is versatile enough to be used for various other purposes such as workout schedules or service outlines. Make a strong impression on potential employers and clients with a sleek, simple, and professional resume.
short_description: Elevate your job search with a professional, simple resume template. Ideal for business services and self-promotion, it showcases your skills and achievements clearly. Stand out in the job market with a clean, organized CV. Versatile for various uses, make a strong impression with a sleek and professional resume.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))

html_data:
Loretta Davis

Account Manager

 
 

123 Street, London
United Kingdom
NW4 1DL

 

+44 123 456 789

 

example@example.com

 

Skills

  • Strong Leadership

  • Communication

  • Good under pressure

  • Strategic Planner
 

References

John Smith

Head of HR in Lorem Ipsum Company.

 

Monica Thompson

Marketing Manager in Lorem Ipsum Company.

 

Mark Hughes

Account Executive in 
Lorem Ipsum Company.

 
 

About Me

A highly motivated and driven account manager with five years’ experience in high level business environments. Confident, tenacious with a proven track record of first class account handling and client satisfaction. Always on task with an ability to identify key business strategies and implement account direction positively. 

 

Work Experience

 

Account Manager

Sep 2020 - Present

 

Focusing on the growth of existing accounts and the acquiring of new business. I am managing and driving
the account team to achieve and exceed set targets.

 

Junior Strategist

Apr 2018 - Sep 2020

Gathering and presenting key data to account executives and suggesting necessary reactions to forecasts. Creating and working to business growth plans.

 

Administration Assistant

Jan 2017 - Apr 2018

Manage workflow by assigning tasks to other administrative employees daily, ensuring that
deadlines are met and work is completed correctly. 

 

Education

 

Exeter University

BA (Hons) Business Administration

A comprehensive and future thinking business degree covering the fundamentals of business operations, including management practices, business law, accounting, finance, marketing and human resources.

 

City of Bristol College

Business Foundation Degree

Modules allow you to either pursue a broad understanding of topics, or to specialise in your chosen field of business, ensuring you can tailor the programme to your aspirations.
